prompt: Create a luxurious concept-entity infographic poster about the religion, arranged as a clean 2x2 grid on a deep navy-to-black cinematic background. Each quadrant contains one floating stone island rendered as a highly detailed miniature monument scene, lit with warm golden rim light and soft volumetric shadows, in an elegant dark fantasy editorial style with realistic materials, symmetrical composition, and refined gold typography. Top left: Islam, featuring a grand ornate mosque with a large central dome, smaller domes, two minarets, arched entry, palm trees, stone steps, and glowing windows, on a circular floating island; on the left side, exactly 3 vertical icon labels reading “TAWHID”, “SALAH”, and “QURAN”; on the right side, one decorative plaque with Arabic calligraphy; at the bottom, a crescent symbol above the large gold title “ISLAM”. Top right: Christianity, featuring a Gothic stone church with tall central steeple topped by a cross, pointed arch doorway, stained-glass style windows, small trees, and a fenced stone path on a floating island; on the left side, exactly 3 vertical icon labels reading “FAITH”, “LOVE”, and “BIBLE”; on the right side, one framed quote plaque reading “FOR GOD SO LOVED THE WORLD THAT HE GAVE HIS ONLY BEGOTTEN SON” and “JOHN 3:16”; at the bottom, a cross symbol integrated into the large gold title “CHRISTIANITY”. Bottom left: Hinduism, featuring an elaborate South Indian temple tower rising above a stepped stone complex with smaller shrines, flags, rocky landscaping, and warm interior glow on a floating island; on the left side, exactly 3 vertical icon labels reading “DHARMA”, “KARMA”, and “MOKSHA”; on the right side, one ornamental mandala-like emblem with the Om symbol; at the bottom, an Om symbol above the large gold title “HINDUISM”. Bottom right: Buddhism, featuring a monumental seated Buddha statue in meditation on a layered stone pedestal, surrounded by rocks, bonsai-like trees, and temple steps on a floating island; on the left side, exactly 3 vertical icon labels reading “MINDFULNESS”, “DHARMA”, and “COMPASSION”; on the right side, one framed quote plaque reading “THE MIND IS EVERYTHING. WHAT YOU THINK YOU BECOME. - BUDDHA -”; at the bottom, a Dharma wheel above the large gold title “BUDDHISM”. Keep all 4 sections visually consistent, with premium gold UI frames, engraved icon badges, polished serif lettering, dramatic studio lighting, high contrast, subtle glow, and immaculate centered presentation.
